properties.name: studio.features.textract.enabled
properties.description: Whether Studio textract auto-configuration is enabled.

properties.name: studio.textract.max-extract-size
properties.description: Maximum file size accepted for text extraction. Plain numbers are bytes; K, KB, M, MB, G, GB, T, and TB suffixes are supported.

properties.name: studio.textract.tesseract.datapath
properties.description: Tesseract tessdata directory used by image OCR.

properties.name: studio.features.text.enabled
properties.description: Legacy text extraction feature wiring toggle.

deprecation.reason: Textract feature wiring now uses the module name in the feature namespace.
Textract runtime policy now uses the module name in the Studio runtime namespace.
Textract runtime policy now uses the module name in the Studio runtime namespace.
Textract runtime policy now uses the module name in the Studio runtime namespace.

properties.name: studio.features.text.max-extract-bytes
properties.description: Legacy text extraction size limit in bytes.

deprecation.reason: Text extraction size is a Studio runtime policy, not a feature wiring setting.
Tesseract settings are Studio textract runtime policy, not feature wiring settings.
Tesseract settings are Studio textract runtime policy, not feature wiring settings.
